ES | EN

How to Take Homeopathy

RULES FOR FOLLOWING A HOMEOPATHIC TREATMENT

For a homeopathic treatment to be as effective as possible, it is recommended to:

- Keep the mouth as clean as possible when taking the homeopathic medicine
- Do not brush teeth with fluoride toothpaste, do not smoke, and do not eat food for at least 10-15 minutes before or 15 minutes after taking the homeopathic remedy; you can drink water. You can use Homeopathic toothpaste or aloe toothpaste (Vitis brand).
- Do not drink chamomile tea, or keep it to a minimum and always separate from taking the medicine.

FORMS OF PRESENTATION:

DROPS = Put the drops in a very clean glass containing a little mineral water. Keep the solution in your mouth, ideally under the tongue, for 1 minute and then swallow it.

DRINKABLE AMPOULES = Put the content of the ampoule in a glass with a little water and proceed as above.

GRANULES AND TABLETS = It is recommended not to touch them with your fingers. According to the medical prescription, keep the granules under your tongue until they dissolve.

SINGLE DOSE = They must be taken all at once and entirely by the patient. Put the content of the entire tube under the tongue until it dissolves.

TRITURATIONS = Powdered form that comes in bottles with a measuring spoon. The patient measures each dose to be taken with the help of this spoon, and should leave it under the tongue until it dissolves.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
